mapper.select: select c.id, c.name, c.sort, count(p.id) as productCount from category c left join product p on p.category_id = c.id and p.status in (0, 1) where c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 group by c.id, c.name, c.sort order by c.sort asc, c.id asc
select id, type, name, sort, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from category where id = #{id}
select id from category where name = #{name} and status = 1 limit 1
select coalesce(max(sort), 0) from category where type = 1 and status = 1

select id, name, category_id as categoryId, price, image, description, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from product where id = #{id}
select id from product where name = #{name} and status in (0, 1) limit 1
select exists( select 1 from category where id = #{categoryId} and type = 1 and status = 1 )
select count(1) from product where category_id = #{categoryId} and status in (0, 1)
mapper.insert: insert into product( name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) values ( #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )

insert into category( type, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) values ( #{type}, #{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: update product set name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
